name: density
description: Ask questions of local Density customer data and render Broadsheet-style answers inline in Codex.

interface.shortDescription: Ask local Density data questions with inline charts.
interface.longDescription: Density helps Codex install or find the Density CLI, verify local Parquet-first storage, sync or prepare customer data, ask natural-language questions, and return concise title/subtitle/chart answers inline.
defaultPrompt: Set up Density for local chart questions
Ask Density what rooms are busiest
Show a Density space type breakdown
